title: Bstorify Scrapbook Photo Albums 60 Pages (21 x 21 cm) Brown Thick Kraft Paper Scrap Book Ideal for Your Scrapbooking Albums Art & Craft Projects
features: This large memory book is durable and suitable for long term storage for you and your loved ones beautiful memories. It has 30 sheets, 60 pages of 200gsm high quality thick Kraft paper, designed with ribbon closure, hard cover and corner protectors

The spiral bound spine allows the scrapbooks to expand to fit in your photos, postcards, souvenirs. You can tie the ribbon into a bow or other style that you like and make your photo album as individual as your memories and keep them endlessly

The hardcover protects the pages, you can design the hardcover and inside pages of this photo book with paints, pens, stickers for a touch of sparkle and shine. You can look back over time at your amazing creation, So get creative now

Scrapbooking is all about telling a story so think about the experiences in your life that means the most to you, lays flat on the desk, hold your art pen, write and record your happy memories beside the photos, Easy to fit 6 x 4 inch photos

It makes an ideal gift for anniversary, mothers day, birthday, valentines day, Christmas, wedding guest book, baby memory book and for recording your travels or add your creative touches and embellishments to make it your own
description: Product Description Journal the significant moments in your life and your loved ones using our scrapbook to create romantic journals Ribbon Tie Your memories, ideas and photos matter to us, and for that, we have added a special ribbon to tie the notebook as you fill it up. The cute bow prevents any embellishments, scraps, photographs etc. from falling out. It also gives the scrapbook an adorable and elegant finishing. Sturdy Cover Each one of our specially crafted scrap-book is bound with a hard back cover to provide support to your unlimited photos and memories. It keeps the paper flat no matter how many embellishments you add to it. Metal Book Corner Protection Our Scrapbook has beautifully ornate metal book corner protectors that keep it looking elegant over a long period of time. It keeps the edges neat and crisp. Thick Paper Our pages are Size 21 x 21 CM, 200 GSM Thick Kraft Paper, structure or design any way you like on these thick plain pages, they are perfect for a new start. Ring Binding Designed to accommodate as many memories as you’d like to add in, the ring binding will allow you to add things without a worry. Things you can add to Scrapbook The only limit is your imagination, so add away stickers, sequins, 3D stickers, cut-outs, washi-tape and let your imagination take reign. Make the colors, ideas, photos pop out Use as Album Create your own history with love in our scrapbook, unlike any other traditional album. You can add beautiful notes, event details and cherish the beautiful moments in a much more intimate way A Memorable Gift Cherish your loved ones by giving them a scrapbook to discover their creativity. Or create a scrapbook album of your memories and relations, like your romantic journey, baby’s first year, family holidays and so much more. For Kids Give your kids the gift of mindfulness, a place to explore their ideas, creativity and save their memories. They will thank you in the years to come for this deeply profound gift.
